profile.personality: A restless, nervous individual who is compelled to constantly move and change positions. They are indifferent to everybody and everything, yet cannot bear to be alone, while simultaneously being averse to talking. They tend to externalize their suffering — when skin symptoms are present they are in fairly good health, but when these are suppressed they become a mental and physical wreck.
profile.mental_state: Thought is difficult, memory is weak, and the mind is absent and unfocused. When eruptions are suppressed, strange mental symptoms emerge including melancholy that fixates on religious or financial matters, shaping itself around the patient's business concerns. In advanced states, the patient deteriorates into insanity with deep sadness and cognitive decline.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by a deep-seated apprehensiveness felt physically in the pit of the stomach — every shock, bad news, or unexpected event triggers a faint, gone, frightened sensation in the solar plexus. They are irritable yet melancholic, swinging between agitated restlessness and profound indifference. There is a pervasive undercurrent of anxiety and vulnerability, as if something dreadful is always about to happen.

profile.personality: The Millefolium constitution is characterized by a passive, yielding temperament with a tendency toward physical vulnerability and fragility of the vascular system. These individuals are prone to exhaustion and depletion, living in a state of constitutional weakness where even slight exertion can provoke serious consequences.
profile.mental_state: The mental picture is dominated by congestion and fullness, with rushes of blood to the head producing dull, heavy headaches and foggy thinking. There is a sensitivity to sudden stimuli, as seen in the startling reaction to noise, suggesting an underlying nervous irritability beneath the passive exterior.
profile.emotional_pattern: Emotionally, the Millefolium patient tends toward a state of quiet vulnerability and apprehension, particularly around physical integrity and the body's inability to contain or repair itself. There is an undercurrent of helplessness tied to the body's failure to maintain boundaries, reflected in the easy bleeding, suppressed discharges, and general atony that pervades the remedy picture.

profile.personality: A self-willed, obstinate, and selfish constitutional type, typically developed through a lifetime of indulgence where every whim was gratified from infancy. These individuals are crafty and cunning manipulators who produce elaborate displays of symptoms to overwhelm those around them into submission.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by hysterical perversion, producing erratic and unpredictable neuropathic phenomena that defy conventional clinical assessment. There is a fundamental unreliability in self-reporting, as the patient has traded upon sensations and imagination for so long that truthful statements become impossible. Constant hurry, dropping things, foolish gestures, and a dread of death with incessant talk of dying characterize the mental picture.
profile.emotional_pattern: Violent fits of anger with rage and scolding escalate until the face turns blue and the patient faints, alternating with states of anguish, apprehension, trembling, and palpitation. Peevishness and quarrelsomeness dominate interpersonal relations, with a deep-seated fear of death including fear of lying down lest she die. The emotional life is fundamentally performative and manipulative, with symptoms intensifying in both quantity and intensity until all desires are attained.

profile.personality: A deeply prostrated individual whose mental faculties remain surprisingly intact even as the body fails catastrophically. They are irritable and withdrawn, refusing engagement not from inability to think but because interaction agitates them. There is a stoic, uncomplaining quality masking profound physical collapse.
profile.mental_state: The mind holds out longer than the body, distinguishing this type from those who lose mental clarity first. The patient is aware and cognitively present but unwilling to exert effort in communication, becoming fretful when pressed to speak. Eventually consciousness fades as the paralytic weakness overtakes all systems.
profile.emotional_pattern: Irritability and desire to be left undisturbed are the dominant emotional features, driven by a sense that any demand is an unbearable imposition on their depleted resources. There is restlessness but far less than the anxious agitation seen in other prostrated types. The emotional tone is one of quiet, resentful exhaustion rather than fear or despair.

profile.personality: A restless, irritable individual who desires to be left alone, preferring to lie down undisturbed yet finding no true comfort in any position. They are conscientious about trifles, easily angered by contradiction, and oscillate between loquacious hyperactivity and complete aversion to mental work or social engagement.
profile.mental_state: Marked difficulty with concentration and mental exertion, especially indoors, with notable improvement in open air. The mind alternates between dullness, forgetfulness, and periods of excessive mental activity with racing ideas, alongside a growing sense of imbecility and prostration of mind.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep-seated anxiety that intensifies in the evening and at night in bed, accompanied by multiple fears — of crowds, of impending disease, of evil, and of people. A pervasive sadness and discontent underlies the temperament, punctuated by episodes of quarrelsomeness and impatience, with an overarching loathing of life and indifference to joy.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive, nervous, and exhausted individual who is chilly, stoop-shouldered, and physically weak. They are profoundly affected by their environment—unable to tolerate extremes of heat or cold, drafts, weather changes, or even minor sensory stimuli like the rustling of paper or the slam of a door.
profile.mental_state: Marked mental fatigue and brain fag; loses the ability to concentrate, forgets what was just read, and cannot hold a thought from the beginning to the end of a sentence. Confusion of mind follows any mental exertion, rendering sustained intellectual work impossible, with progressive deterioration of memory and cognitive function.
profile.emotional_pattern: Estranged from family, friends, and society, feeling a deep division between themselves and others, with aversion to both relatives and strangers. Music provokes intense melancholy, weeping, and even suicidal tendencies; the overall emotional state is one of anxious trepidation, irritability, and a fragile nervousness that can escalate into religious insanity.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive, emotionally intense individual who is easily disturbed by external stimuli such as noise, music, and excitement. The Natrum Muriaticum type presents as nervous, irritable, and hysterical, with a greasy, waxy, pale appearance and tendency toward emaciation, particularly from the upper body downward.
profile.mental_state: Marked mental prostration with extreme forgetfulness, inability to concentrate or meditate, and loss of the thread of thought while reading or listening. The mind is in a state of nervous fret and irritation, with heightened sensitivity to all impressions, feeling everything amplified, and a tendency toward hysterical alternation between spasmodic laughter and deep sadness.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of deep, inconsolable grief and joylessness, with a paradoxical relationship to sympathy — appearing to seek consolation yet becoming angry when it is offered. There is a tendency to dwell on past unpleasant events, to grieve over nothing, and to form unrequited or unwise emotional attachments that cannot be controlled. Weeping alternates with inappropriate laughter, and the melancholy is resistant to cheering circumstances.

profile.personality: A mentally and physically exhausted individual, worn down by intellectual overwork and sexual excesses, who becomes increasingly withdrawn, silent, and indifferent to surroundings and family. They are impatient, irritable over trifles, and hypersensitive to external stimuli such as music, noise, and thunderstorms.
profile.mental_state: The mind is progressively dulled, with difficulty concentrating, forgetfulness, and a sluggishness that approaches imbecility under prolonged strain. Confusion worsens in the morning, after eating, and from any mental exertion, accompanied by wandering thoughts and an alternation between abundant ideas and complete mental vacancy. Delusions of seeing dead people, hearing footsteps, and fears of impending disease reveal a mind losing its grip on reality.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep-seated anxiety pervades, especially at night, on waking, and about the future and health, coupled with a pervasive sadness triggered by music, emissions, and evening hours. They oscillate between restless agitation and a profound indifference that extends even to loved ones, growing increasingly timid, bashful, suspicious, and prone to easy weeping as their emotional resilience collapses.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive, irritable individual of bilious constitution who is averse to company and dislikes speaking or being spoken to. They are oversensitive both mentally and physically, easily startled, suspicious, and intensely fastidious, with a strong need for open air and movement to feel better.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dull yet excitable, with poor concentration worsened by mental exertion. Forgetfulness, indifference, and indolence predominate, along with fear of crowds, evil, and people. Mental symptoms frequently arise from head injuries, and there is a marked tendency toward vertigo and confusion that disrupts engagement with work and responsibilities.
profile.emotional_pattern: Profound morning sadness and anxiety that characteristically lift after breakfast, with intense suicidal impulses requiring constant self-restraint. Music deepens their melancholy, and there is a pervasive loathing of life coupled with deep restlessness and apprehension about the future, though episodes of cheerfulness can appear unexpectedly, particularly after stool.

profile.personality: A deeply broken-down individual, worn by prolonged physical suffering, who presents as irritable, obstinate, and hypersensitive to all stimuli including noise, cold, and even medicines. They are chilly, emaciated, and anxious-looking with an expression of deep suffering etched into their features.
profile.mental_state: Mental prostration with vanishing thoughts upon any effort to reflect; inability to comprehend what is said. The mind is exhausted yet paradoxically restless—weary of life but terrified of death, with constant anxiety about declining health and an inability to be consoled or comforted about misfortune.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by hopeless despair alternating with irritable anger—they rage over their own mistakes, tremble with anger, and refuse consolation, yet are easily startled and moved to weeping. A pervasive indifference and joylessness pervades their existence, worsening before menses and in the evening, with a peculiar amelioration of the entire mental state while riding in a carriage.

rubric_passages.Extremities: Rheumatic pains in limbs. Emaciation of upper arms, and thighs. Weakness of limbs. Dropsy of limbs. Crippled nails. Rheumatic pains in upper limbs. Stitching. Sticking pains in limbs in cold weather.

rubric_passages.Generalities: Great general weakness; feeble reaction; extreme sensitivity, and nervous trembling, are marked features in this remedy. Patients greatly broken by long suffering, pain and sickness, physical more than mental suffering, finally anemia and emaciation are marked. Sensitive to cold; always chilly. Symptoms are aggravated from becoming cold, and in cold air. Always taking cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning spots in spine. Itching and burning in anus. Sore mouth with stinging, burning pain.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Great general weakness; feeble reaction; extreme sensitivity, and nervous trembling, are marked features in this remedy. Patients greatly broken by long suffering, pain and sickness, physical more than mental suffering, finally anemia and emaciation are marked.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The female is greatly troubled by the constant itching and burning and sexual desire. Excoriation of the parts from leucorrhoea and menstrual discharges. Every exertion brings on uterine hemorrhage (Calc.). The menstrual flow is dark and thick. Menses too soon and profuse, like bloody, water. Uterine prolapsus.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Many and extreme nervous sufferings come during the menstrual period; flatulence, bruised pain in limbs, pain down thighs, "splinter" under the finger and toe nails, palpitation, anxiety, trembling, neuralgic pains in any part.
rubric_passages.Head: Suffers much from vertigo in the morning; must lie down. His headaches are violent, aggravated from noise of wagons on the paved streets, but often ameliorated from riding in a carriage on a smooth, country road. The noise and jarring increase the pain, Pain as if in a vise from car to car.
rubric_passages.Mind: Prostration of mind. Any effort to reflect on certain things causes the thoughts to vanish. A general indifference to all matters; tired of life; has no enjoyment in anything; aggravated before menses. Mental depression in the evening. Anxiety about his failing health, with fear of death.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: He is angered over his own mistakes. Anger with trembling. Obstinate and refuses to be comforted about his misfortune. He is weary of life but fears death.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The tongue is excoriated, sore, red, yellow, white and dry, fissured, with sore spots. Ulceration of tongue with viscid mucus in mouth. Inflammation of the tongue. Ulcers in mouth, on tongue or in throat, white, or dark and dirty, putrid, phagedenic, syphilitic, with sticking pains as from splinters. Sore mouth with stinging, burning pain. Excoriated, red, swollen membrane. Foul cadaveric odor from the mouth.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Anus excoriated, burning, fissured, covered with warts. Membrane comes with the stool. Much pure blood with the stool not even clotted, very offensive. Ineffectual urging to stool. Sensation as if rectum were filled and he cannot expel it.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation, painful hard difficult stool. Drawing, cutting and pressing before stool; constant fruitless urging (Nux v.).
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: The pain keeps her in bed for hours after every stool. During stool there is colic, tenesmus, spasmodic contraction of anus, unsatisfactory straining. Splinters in rectum. After stool there is still urging (Merc.), exhaustion; soreness of anus; cutting pain; burning and shooting in rectum; constriction of anus; great nervous excitement; palpitation.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Itching and burning in anus. After stool there is still urging (Merc.), exhaustion; soreness of anus; cutting pain; burning and shooting in rectum; constriction of anus; great nervous excitement; palpitation.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Shortness of breath. Intermittent breathing. Oppression of the chest, ameliorated by expectoration.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Shortness of breath. Oppression of the chest, ameliorated by expectoration.
rubric_passages.Skin: Fissures form in many places; canthi, corners of the mouth, above the anus; the skin cracks - and all these have the splinter sensation. The margins of orifices bleed and grow warts.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Shocks on going to sleep (Agar., Arg. n., Ars., Nat. m.). The pain comes during sleep. Starting in sleep. Anxious, unrefreshing sleep, with frightful dreams.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The stomach is disordered by milk. Food sours, and causes sour eructations and vomiting. Fats disagree. Nausea after eating, ameliorated by moving about or riding in a carriage. Vomiting bitter and sour, contents of stomach. Ulceration of stomach. Pain in cardiac, opening of stomach on swallowing. Sticking pain in stomach. Catarrh of stomach. Weight after eating. Sensation of rawness in stomach after eating.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion, meat: Longing for fats, pungent things, herring, chalk, lime, earth; and aversion to bread and meat.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Generally thirstless. The thirstlessness during all stages has often called attention to it.

profile.personality: A dazed, automatic individual who goes through daily routines as if in a dream state, performing duties mechanically without full conscious awareness. Predominantly seen in nervous, hysterical women who are lean and have lost flesh, with extreme sensitivity to environmental conditions such as wind, cold, and dampness.
profile.mental_state: Profound loss of memory and dreamlike consciousness are the keynotes; she speaks intelligently in the moment but retains nothing of the past and forgets what she has been doing if interrupted. There is a tendency toward clairvoyance and prophetic speech, combined with an overwhelming, irresistible sleepiness that makes her fall asleep on all occasions. When aroused she looks dazed and confused, answering questions slowly or irrelevantly.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deeply susceptible to emotional shock — blighted affections, loss of a friend, or fright can trigger the characteristic dazed and dissociated state. She is prone to hysteria, faintness, and momentary paralysis of a functional nature, reflecting a nervous system that withdraws into numbness and disconnection rather than expressing distress outwardly.

rubric_passages.Back: The whole back is sensitive to pressure, the vertebrae are sensitive.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: The whole back is sensitive to pressure, the vertebrae are sensitive.
rubric_passages.Chest: The breasts are flat. I remember a case of a woman thirty five years old whose breasts which were once well rounded became perfectly flat. Nux mos. restored the breasts.
rubric_passages.Chill: She is so sensitive to cold weather that she comes home dazed and sleepy from walking against the wind.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In the extremities there is numbness, tingling, prickling, paralytic weakness; there is threatened paralysis; momentary hysterical paralysis; coming for a short time and then going away.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: In the extremities there is numbness, tingling, prickling, paralytic weakness; there is threatened paralysis; momentary hysterical paralysis; coming for a short time and then going away.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient is sensitive to wind, to a draft, to damp air.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Faintness and even fainting when standing long, such as occurs in a nervous woman standing to have a dress fitted.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In woman there are many troubles; menorrhagia lasting ten or fifteen days; the blood is clotted; the menses are too often, last too long, are irregular.
rubric_passages.Head: She has a headache < walking against the wind.
rubric_passages.Mind: The patient appears to be dazed; there is a complete loss of memory; she is automatic in her actions. This is a wonderful state of the mind. She goes about the house performing her duties, but if interrupted, forgets what she has been doing, forgets that she was all day in conversation with her son; she has no recollection of past events.
rubric_passages.Mouth: There is a dry mouth, the tongue cleaves to the roof of the mouth in all complaints.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: There is a dry mouth, the tongue cleaves to the roof of the mouth in all complaints. There is great sleepiness and automatic conduct, especially in nervous women.
rubric_passages.Rectum: This remedy has prolonged and inveterate constipation; prolonged urging to stool followed by a soft stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: This remedy has prolonged and inveterate constipation; prolonged urging to stool followed by a soft stool. The stool is difficult but soft. He wonders why he has to urge for a soft stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Aphonia with a dry mouth, in hysterical patients; when walking out of doors. This aphonia passes away on going into the house.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The Nux mos. patient is always ready to go to sleep; it is with great difficulty that she can keep awake. She falls asleep on all occasions, in season and out of season. The eyes look heavy; she cannot keep awake; falls into a profound slumber, sometimes into coma.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: The Nux mos. patient is always ready to go to sleep; it is with great difficulty that she can keep awake. She falls asleep on all occasions, in season and out of season.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The hemorrhages stand out in bold relief; hemorrhages from the nose, uterus and bowels. There is vomiting of blood.
rubric_passages.Stomach, distension: The abdomen is full of colic; cramping pains extending to be broad ligaments and down the limbs.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Her mouth is dry but there is no thirst, she doesn't desire water (sometimes thirst is present).
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: The abdomen is full of colic; cramping pains extending to be broad ligaments and down the limbs; most distressing dysmenorrhoea from exposure to cold, riding in the wind or living in damp houses.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: Faintness and even fainting when standing long, such as occurs in a nervous woman standing to have a dress fitted.

profile.personality: The Nux Vomica type is an driven, overworked business person who pushes themselves to exhaustion through stimulants, late nights, and relentless attention to detail. They are lean, withered, prematurely aged, and perpetually dissatisfied with their surroundings, food, and the people around them.
profile.mental_state: The mind is fatigued from constant mental overwork—a whirl of business details that crowd in day and night, preventing sleep and causing brain fag. They wake at 3 A.M. unable to stop thinking, yet cannot concentrate properly; memory must be artificially stimulated and confusion sets in. This mental exhaustion progresses toward the verge of insanity, with hypochondriasis, despair, and an inability to bear reading or conversation.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is an uncontrollable, spasmodic irritability born of weakness rather than strength—they quarrel, scold, reproach, and insult, then shortly afterward howl and weep aloud. They cannot be contradicted or opposed without flying into a destructive rage, yet underneath lies deep melancholy, sadness, and a feeling of being driven to pieces. Violent impulses toward destruction of others alternate with jealousy, sexual excess, and eventual despair that can progress to suicidal ideation.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Pressure and sense of weakness in, the left inguinal ring - hence cures hernia in babies
rubric_passages.Back: A drawing in the back like a pulling or tension in the muscles.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness: the chill begins in the extremities or back, and extends over the whole body
rubric_passages.Back, pain: drawing pain in the back; drawing pain in the back of the neck, forcing the patient to let the head go back; drawing pain down the spine; lumbago. Backache worse as soon as she lies down (pregnancy) as if it would break
rubric_passages.Bladder: The same condition is found in the bladder. He must strain to urinate. There is tenesmus, urging. The bladder is full and the urine dribbles away, yet when he strains it ceases to dribble.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: colicky pains which urge to stool and urination; renal colic, especially when each pain shoots to the rectum and urges to stool.
rubric_passages.Chest: Colds settle in the nose, throat, chest and ears. ... Dry, teasing cough with great soreness of the chest, like Bry., the head feels as if it would split.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation and excitement of the heart and circulation. Much throbbing, Worse in the morning - mentally and physically.
rubric_passages.Chill: Chills and fever; heat and sweat intermingled. In chills the fingers and hands are cold, and purple; cold from head to foot; the chill begins in the extremities or back, and extends over the whole body and, the patient must be covered up.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Drawing pains in the extremities causing spasms in the calves, feet, and toes.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: cold from head to foot; the chill begins in the extremities or back, and extends over the whole body
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: In chills the fingers and hands are cold, and purple
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis of the extremities; of the face; one arm; one hand; single muscles; facial paralysis not uncommonly cured by Nux.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Everywhere in this remedy we observe the striking oversensitiveness of the patient; it is brought out in all the symptoms.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: neuralgic headaches the pains stick, and tear; they cause weeping, fainting; they burn and sting.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Pains shoot from the rectum up; burning. ... Cough; burning in the air passages; all the mucous membranes in a state of irritation
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Menses too soon; too long; flow copious; more strikingly prolonged; flows and dribbles just enough to stain the linen, starting up now and again with clots.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: At times attended with violent pains, cramps in the uterus, extending over the body, ameliorated from heat and pressure; aggravated by the slightest current of air or cold; pains and spasms ameliorated by the hot water bottle, clothing, and heat.
rubric_passages.Head: Headaches as if a stone pressed upon the vertex. ... Bursting sensation in the head as if a stone crushed the vertex after disordered stomach.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental state is varied, but they all show oversensitiveness irritable, touchy, sensitive conditions. They are never contented, never satisfied; disturbed by their surroundings, and the become irritable, so that they want to tear things, to scold.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: An uncontrollable state of irritability; it is a weakness and is accompanied by physical weakness; a lack of balance.
rubric_passages.Mouth: foul mouth in the morning also like Puls.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Nux suffers from a disordered stomach. A stasis of the portal system is present, portal congestion; stasis in hoemorrhoidal veins with hemorrhoids; constipation; dysentery; paralysis of the rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: In constipation the more he strains the harder it is to pass a stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Hemorrhoids, portal congestion, cutting pains to rectum causing urging to stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Pains shoot from the rectum up; burning.

profile.personality: The Opium constitutional type is characterized by profound torpor, inactivity, and a striking indifference to their surroundings. They want to be left alone, insist they are well even when gravely ill, and exist in a state of detachment from reality with perversion of all senses. In their alternate state, they can be excitable, loquacious, and hypersensitive to the slightest noise, light, or odor.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by sluggishness, confusion, and stupor, with an inability to realize or judge their actual condition. There is marked self-deception about their state of health, a besotted quality to their consciousness, and when aroused from stupor they startle with expressions of awful fear or anxiety. Constitutional liars with no conscience, they experience visions of frightful images, black forms, devils, and ghosts.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional duality swings between a state of blissful well-being, happiness, and false confidence, and an overwhelming state of fear, anxiety, and dread. Fear is the central emotional driver — fright produces lasting effects where the object of fear remains perpetually before the eyes, triggering convulsions, diarrhea, or suppressed menses. They are also deeply affected by sudden joy, anger, and shame, with emotional shocks producing profound physical consequences.

rubric_passages.Back: Opisthotonos; head drawn back, cerebro-spinal meningitis.
rubric_passages.Bladder: The bladder is in a similar state. There is no ability to use the abdominal muscles; he cannot strain to urinate retention of accelerator muscles are in a state of paresis.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Weakness of limbs and muscles; weakness and paralysis.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: if the mother puts that child into a hot bath, to relieve the convulsions, it will become unconscious and cold as death.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Weakness of limbs and muscles; weakness and paralysis.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Among the striking features of Opium is a class of complaints marked by painlessness, inactivity, and torpor.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: A pregnant woman is frightened and an abortion is impending, and the object of the fright continually looms up before her eyes.
rubric_passages.Head: Nervous headaches beginning in the back of the head and spreading over the whole face; worse in the morning. He feels as if his head were held down to the pillow by the intense aching pain in the base of the brain and yet when he gets up he is unable to lie down again.
rubric_passages.Mind: A mental state appears in these constitutions. Fear and its results. The Opium patient, when not too stupid, rouses up as if startled, rouses up with the appearance of awful fear or anxiety.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Paralytic conditions or paresis, partial paralysis; inactivity, sluggishness. Such a condition is found in the bowels so that they do not move, and rectum fills with round, hard, black balls, which can be dug out with the finger or spoon. There is no activity, no ability to strain at stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: rectum fills with round, hard, black balls, which can be dug out with the finger or spoon. There is no activity, no ability to strain at stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: cerebral apoplexy with stertorous breathing, jaw dropped, pupils dilated or contracted, generally the latter, face mottled, purple, or hot, hot sweat, one sided paralysis.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: cerebral apoplexy with stertorous breathing, jaw dropped, pupils dilated or contracted.
rubric_passages.Skin: skin red; face red and mottled, pupils contracted.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The patient is sleepy, yet at times the drug is characterized by sleepless nights, anxiety, increased sensitiveness to noise, so that he says ho can almost hear the flies walking on the wall, and hears the clock striking in the distant steeple.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: sleepless nights, anxiety, increased sensitiveness to noise, so that he says ho can almost hear the flies walking on the wall, and hears the clock striking in the distant steeple.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Drowsiness with headache, amounting almost to stupor.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The stomach is in a state of undue warmth, sinking, all-gone, hungry, and this is not relieved by eating. He fills the stomach full and yet the faint feeling remains. The food sours in the stomach and is vomited.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): The stomach is in a state of undue warmth, sinking, all-gone, hungry, and this is not relieved by eating. He fills the stomach full and yet the faint feeling remains.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: The bladder is in a similar state. There is no ability to use the abdominal muscles; he cannot strain to urinate retention of accelerator muscles are in a state of paresis.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive, nervous individual prone to physical and mental exhaustion, particularly affecting the heart and nervous system. They are introverted with an aversion to conversation, oscillating between states of exhilaration and profound dejection. Their suffering is markedly amplified by mental focus — symptoms worsen when thinking about them — suggesting a constitution where mind and body are unusually intertwined.
profile.mental_state: The mind alternates between excitement and loss of memory, with episodes of maniacal conduct giving way to mental dullness and an empty-headed sensation. Concentration worsens their condition, as pains and symptoms intensify when attended to mentally. There is a tendency toward mental fog, vanishing of sight, and dizziness from cerebral congestion.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of anxious vulnerability — frightening dreams, waking in cold sweat with palpitation, and a pervasive sense of physical fragility that feeds emotional withdrawal. They swing between nervous excitability and flat dejection, avoiding social engagement. An undercurrent of fear runs through the constitution, tied to cardiac distress and the overwhelming nature of their paroxysmal pains.

rubric_passages.Chest: Sharp, shooting pains in left lung, heart and left hypochondrium. With inability to breathe during perfect rest; soreness in chest; pain in middle of chest through to the back.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Numbness in shoulders to finger tips; sharp lancinating pains in arms; right wrist feels sprained; pain in right metacarpus and fleshy part of right thumb with heat and numbness; hands almost helpless; hands cold as if dead; fingers and nails blue in heart complaints; pains in the points of flexed fingers.
rubric_passages.Mind: At times there is great excitement and exhilaration again there is loss of memory and dejection; maniacal conduct; aversion to conversation.
rubric_passages.Respiration: In complaints of the heart there is most difficult breathing. In feeble, nervous women there is paroxysmal breathing; violent rapid respiration with intervals of normal breathing; jerking inspiration and sudden, forced expiration in angina pectoris; dyspnoea with constriction in the larynx that is very painful; with wheezing and oppression of chest worse thinking of it.
rubric_passages.Skin: The body is mottled in places.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Sharp, shooting pains in left lung, heart and left hypochondrium. With inability to breathe during perfect rest; soreness in chest; pain in middle of chest through to the back.
rubric_passages.Mind, thinking: The symptoms, and especially the pains, come on or are worse when thinking about them.
rubric_passages.Chest, angina pectoris: jerking inspiration and sudden, forced expiration in angina pectoris
rubric_passages.Extremities, numbness: numbness of the body and limbs; blueness of the lower limbs, fingers and lips; paralysis of the limbs are symptoms showing how violently this remedy takes hold of the body, affecting the heart, spinal cord and brain.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain, stitching: Stitching tearing pains behind the sternum going to shoulders and arms; worse on left side; with blueness of nails and lips; cold sweat paralysis of lower limbs; spasmodic respiration
rubric_passages.Extremities, numbness, upper limbs: Numbness in shoulders to finger tips; sharp lancinating pains in arms; right wrist feels sprained; pain in right metacarpus and fleshy part of right thumb with heat and numbness; hands almost helpless
rubric_passages.Skin, coldness: Numbness, pricking, causing a cold sensation with weakness in spine.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain, stitching, lower part: Dullness in lower part of left lung. Stitching tearing pains behind the sternum going to shoulders and arms; worse on left side

rubric_passages.Back, pain: violent aching pain in back, and down the thighs, relieved by change of position. This symptom is an exception as the pains are generally worse from motion. Benumbing pains in the small of back better after stool.

rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae: Pain under point of scapula, between shoulders, extending downward to small of back; stitches in chest, extending to scapula
rubric_passages.Bladder: Frequent urination; copious; urine containing oxalate of lime; soreness of whole urinary tract; the urine causes soreness and burning of the urethra; when urinating there is pain in the glans penis; incontinence of urine in sleep; all the urinary symptoms are worse when thinking about them.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Violent palpitation in rheumatic subjects, worse when thinking about it. Pulse irregular, intermittent, fast; cold sweat, blue nails, great weakness. Fluttering heart.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The legs are stiff, numb and weak; lower limbs cold, blue and paralyzed.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: hands cold as if dead; fingers and nails blue in heart complaints
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: paralysis of the limbs are symptoms showing how violently this remedy takes hold of the body, affecting the heart, spinal cord and brain.

profile.personality: A confused, disoriented individual who easily loses their way, both literally and figuratively. They tend to be lean and emaciated, highly sensitive to environmental changes (weather, motion, cold), and prone to restless irritability driven by intense physical discomfort that compels scratching or eating despite the pain it causes.
profile.mental_state: Marked by profound confusion and dazedness, particularly upon waking or in semi-conscious states, with an inability to orient themselves—they lose their way in familiar streets. Strange delusions of duality pervade their thinking: imagining their limbs are double, that another person shares their bed, or that they are two people at once. These impressions persist in twilight states and can only be reasoned away upon full wakefulness, returning again when consciousness fades.
profile.emotional_pattern: An underlying anxiety and annoyance driven by persistent, inescapable sensory disturbances—relentless itching, burning, and gnawing hunger that cannot be satisfied without pain. They experience a restless, driven quality where discomfort compels action (scratching until bleeding, eating despite stomach pain), coupled with a sensitivity that makes them reactive to their surroundings, weather changes, and the touch of clothing on inflamed skin.

rubric_passages.Back: Stiffness in the back. Pain in the back on rising from a seat.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Stiffness in the back. Pain in the back on rising from a seat.
rubric_passages.Chest: the trouble extends to the chest, causing a catarrhal condition with cough. He coughs especially at night, and there is emaciation of the body with pain and soreness of the chest. Dry, hacking cough, alternating with copious expectoration; emaciation about the chest.
rubric_passages.Chill: coldness in spots is quite a feature of this remedy. Coldness in spots; coldness in the stomach, in the abdomen, in the uterus; coldness in a spot between the scapula; coldness in the heart - sensation as if the heart were cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Paretic conditions, especially left-sided. Weakness of muscles, weakness of the lower extremities, especially left-sided.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: coldness in spots is quite a feature of this remedy. Coldness in spots.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Sore bruised feeling all over the body, especially in the joint. Rheumatic pain in the joints on motion; sore to touch; sensation as if bruised. It is analogous to Arnica in relation to bruises.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Sweat and moisture of external genitals of both sexes. Scurfy nipples; white, bran-like scurf; itching; always peeling off. If the woman is in run-down health, then the nipples inflame and become oversensitive to the touch of clothing.
rubric_passages.Head: Petroleum is suitable in old stubborn occipital headaches. The pain often remains in the occiput, but when very severe it extends up over the top of the head to the eyes and forehead. Pain from occiput over head to forehead and eyes, with transitory blindness; he gets stiff; loses consciousness.
rubric_passages.Mind: Among the early things that Petroleum does to a prover is that it puts him in a state of confusion of mind and dizziness; he is dazed so that he loses his way in the street. She has strange imaginations that there are people near her who are not present; that the atmosphere is full of strange forms; that her limbs are double; that another person is in the bed with her.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: This annoys him day and night.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Catarrh of the rectum, much mucus with the stools. Diarrhoea during the day time, ameliorated at night, while the patient is quiet and at rest.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin is rough, ragged, exfoliates, cracks, bleeds; the tissues are hardened; this occurs sometimes about the palms of the hands and nails. This tissue ulcerates, and the ulcers eat and spread. All eruptions itch violently. He can not rest until he scratches the skin off, when the part becomes moist, bloody, raw and inflamed.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Catarrh of the stomach and bowels. He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. Nausea and qualmishness all day.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat. With the diarrhea there is constant hunger, yet he cannot eat without pain.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: The Petroleum constitution produces a peculiar vertigo which comes on under regular circumstances, when on ship-board, or riding in a carriage, or on the ears. It suits occipital headache from riding on the ears, or from such motions, with nausea like seasickness.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Sore bruised feeling all over the body, especially in the joint. Rheumatic pain in the joints on motion; sore to touch; sensation as if bruised.
rubric_passages.Appetite: He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous: There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat. With the diarrhea there is constant hunger, yet he cannot eat without pain.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Very sensitive to change of weather, like Phos. and Rhod.; aggravated before a thunder storm. Often sensitive to air and cold. Lean, emaciated subjects; threatening consumption. Eruptions disappear of themselves or are suppressed. Hands and feet burn; wants the palms and soles out of bed.

profile.personality: A deeply exhausted, apathetic individual who withdraws from social interaction and prefers to be left alone in quiet. Despite appearing physically vigorous in early stages, they are mentally depleted from prolonged grief, overwork, study, or emotional loss. They are indifferent to their surroundings and slow to respond, giving an impression of someone whose inner vitality has been silently consumed.
profile.mental_state: Profound mental enfeeblement is the hallmark: inability to think clearly, connect ideas, recall familiar names, or sustain concentration for reading or arithmetic. The mind gives out first while the body remains temporarily strong, progressing from brain-fag and confusion to near-stupor. Answers come slowly or not at all, and the patient cannot frame thoughts into words.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by grief, sorrow, and homesickness — ailments arise from prolonged mourning, disappointed love, or unrequited affection. The emotional response is one of quiet pining and resigned indifference rather than dramatic outbursts. Drowsiness, apathy, and a desire to be undisturbed replace active emotional engagement, as if the capacity to feel has been worn away by sustained loss.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, rumbling: Singing sensation in the abdomen after a normal stool.
rubric_passages.Back: Sore spots in the spine; lame back. Backache.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Sore spots in the spine; lame back. Backache.
rubric_passages.Bladder: In most of the complaints of Phosphoric acid a marked feature is milky urine. Sometimes it is milky when passed; milky flakes in the urine. At times the male urethra seems to clog up and examination will show these little milk-like-flakes. The urine becomes milky on standing, like flour, chalk or phosphate deposits stirred up in it.
rubric_passages.Chest: The tendency of the Phosphoric acid patient at the end of the brain fag and weakness is to run into chest troubles. If a diarrhea comes on then the chest trouble is averted.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Prolonged fever ending in feeble heart, with palpitation and the mental symptoms. Palpitating during sexual excitement.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Limbs and joints become affected. Pain in the hip joint. Pains in the long bones between the joints, better by motion. Old gouty constitution.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: cold extremities; feeble circulation, feeble heart
rubric_passages.Generalities: Pains and aches all over the body, ameliorated from motion and worse from cold. The pains seem deep-seated, often along the nerves, but especially along the long bones, as if the bones were scraped; as if a rough instrument were dragged over the bones. The pains are commonly worse at night. Severe bone pains.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Phosphoric acid has also great physical weakness; so tired in the back; so tired in the muscles; so tired all over; a paralytic weakness.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Phosphoric acid produces a troublesome leucorrhoea; yellow, mostly after menses, with itching; profuse, yellow; thin, acid mucus; with chlorosis.
rubric_passages.Head: In the headache the pain often begins in the back of the head and spreads to the top of the load; feels as if a crushing weight were on the top of the head; worse from motion, talking and light.
rubric_passages.Mind: Mental enfeeblement is the thought that will come into the mind when considering what the Phosphoric acid patient says, does and looks. The mind seems tired. When questioned he answers slowly or does not speak, but only looks at the questioner. He is too tired to talk or even think.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Don't talk to me; let me alone.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: Most of the complaints are ameliorated from keeping warm, from absolute quiet, from being alone at peace. There is aggravation of the complaints from exertion, mental or physical, from being talked to.
rubric_passages.Mouth: dry, brown tongue, sordes on the teeth
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: dry, brown tongue, sordes on the teeth
rubric_passages.Rectum: Copious, thin, watery stool. From the quantity it would seem that the patient would be exhausted.
rubric_passages.Skin: Boils, abscesses, pustules and other moist eruptions. Suppurating eruptions; tissues become weak.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Ailments from care, grief, sorrow, chagrin, homesickness or disappointed love; particularly with drowsiness; night sweats towards morning; emaciation.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Ailments from care, grief, sorrow, chagrin, homesickness or disappointed love; particularly with drowsiness; night sweats towards morning; emaciation.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The stomach refuses to do its work. The food remains in the stomach and sours. Sour vomiting. Old dyspeptics with brain-fag. Complaints from acid drinks, cold drinks and rich foods.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: The food remains in the stomach and sours. Sour vomiting.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: little thirst increasing to intense thirst with craving for much water during perspiration
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Abdomen: much bloated, tympanitic; great soreness of the bowels as if in a typhoid state.

profile.personality: The Phosphorus constitution is a delicate, slender, rapidly emaciating individual who is vehement and irascible, with an internal state of turmoil. They are highly sensitive to all external impressions—odors, noises, touch—and prone to great excitability that can reach ecstasy or even clairvoyance. They crave company, are worse when alone or in the dark, and desire cold drinks and refreshing things.
profile.mental_state: The mind oscillates between overactivity with wild thoughts, violent imaginations, and inability to sustain mental effort, and extreme passivity with loss of memory, sluggish thinking, and stupor. There is great prostration of mind after even slight mental exertion, with reflecting bringing on headaches and difficult breathing. The mental state can progress from anxiety and fearfulness through hypochondriasis to the borderland of insanity, imbecility, and idiocy.
profile.emotional_pattern: Fear is the dominant emotional theme—fear at twilight, fear when alone, fear of death, fear during thunderstorms, fear of apoplexy—with anxiety seeming to originate from the pit of the stomach. There is a marked oscillation between emotional extremes: from weeping, sadness, and deep indifference to loved ones and surroundings, to violent loquacious delirium and maniacal fury. Gloomy forebodings and apprehensiveness pervade, alternating with periods of complete apathy where everything looks dark and the patient is weary of life.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: The liver furnishes us many symptoms of Phosphorus. Congestion of the liver, fullness, pain, hardness, fatty degeneration of the liver, hyperemia of the liver. Phosphorus is one of the most useful liver remedies; hard, large liver.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard, liver: The liver furnishes us many symptoms of Phosphorus. Congestion of the liver, fullness, pain, hardness, fatty degeneration of the liver, hyperemia of the liver. Phosphorus is one of the most useful liver remedies; hard, large liver.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, rumbling: Very sensitive abdomen, painful to touch, rolling and rumbling.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Sensation of emptiness in the abdomen; sunken feeling in the abdomen. The abdomen feels as if relaxed; hanging down sensation and sensation of great weight in the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Back: There are many symptoms in the back; stiffness in the back and in the back of the neck, between the shoulders, and in the small of the back. Stiffness on rising from a seat. Sensation of intense heat in the back running up the back. The patient complains of a hot spine.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Soreness in places up and down the spine; soreness to touch between the shoulders; pulsations in various places in the back and in the whole spine. The coccyx is sensitive to pressure; pain in the coccyx as if ulcerated, preventing motion. Pain in the back during menstruation and during confinement as if the back would break.
rubric_passages.Bladder: No desire to pass urine though the bladder is full. There is a paralytic weakness which resembles the paralytic weakness throughout all the muscles of the body. He is unable to strain to pass the urine because such straining increases pain in the region of the bladder.
rubric_passages.Chest: In the chest, Phosphorus produces oppression; anxiety, weakness and constriction going along with its chest complaints. Heaviness as if a great weight were lying upon the chest. With the cough, bronchitis, pneumonia and cardiac symptoms there is always more or less constriction of the chest as if bound, or as if bandaged, or as if tied tight with a string.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Phosphorus has violent palpitation; worse from motion, and from lying on the left side especially in the evening; worse at night on waking, with orgasms of blood in the chest, accompanied by much suffocation.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In the limbs we have paralytic weakness extending to both arms and legs, with trembling and numbness; paralysis of one or of both lower extremities or of the upper extremities with trembling and numbness.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: coldness of the extremities, and sugar in the urine.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: The hands and arms become very cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: In the limbs we have paralytic weakness extending to both arms and legs, with trembling and numbness; paralysis of one or of both lower extremities or of the upper extremities with trembling and numbness.
rubric_passages.Extremities, shrivelled (shrunken): The limbs emaciate and the veins become distended.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The complaints of Phosphorus are most likely to arise in the feeble constitutions, such as have been born sick, grown up slender, and grown too rapidly. Its complaints are found in such as are emaciated, and in those who are rapidly emaciating; in children who are going into marasmus, and in persons who have in them the foundation of consumption fairly well laid. Delicate, waxy, anemic and emaciated subjects.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning pains are observed everywhere. Burning in the brain, burning in the skin. Burning in the stomach, in the chest, and in various parts.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness prevails in a marked degree, finally becoming paralysis or paralytic weakness such as occurs in most forms of typhoid fever, with sliding down in bed, trembling and jerking of the muscles.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Phosphorus has cured many cases of sterility supposed to depend upon violent sexual excitement. Violent sexual excitement with aversion to coition. Violent pain in the ovaries extending down the inner side of the thighs during menstruation caused by inflammation of the ovaries.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Violent pain in the ovaries extending down the inner side of the thighs during menstruation caused by inflammation of the ovaries. Stitching pains upward from the vagina into the pelvis. Burning and smarting in the vagina.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches of Phosphorus are congestive and throbbing. The blood mounts to the head. The headaches are ameliorated from cold and worse from heat, worse from motion, and better from rest, worse lying down.
rubric_passages.Mind: Excitability even to ecstasy and clairvoyance. The mind may be overactive or may be extremely passive with loss of memory. Irritability of mind and body and great prostration of mind after slight mental effort, and of the body after slight physical exertion. Anxiety, gloomy forebodings. Fear that something will happen. Anxious at twilight. Anxious when alone.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Irritability of mind and body and great prostration of mind after slight mental effort, and of the body after slight physical exertion.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The tongue is swollen and speech is difficult. It is difficult to articulate. The taste in the mouth is bitter or sour, especially sour after taking milk; sometimes salty or sweetish; bitter after eating. The tongue is coated like fur; sometimes chalky-white, sometimes yellow; dry, cracked and bleeding; sordes on the teeth.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth and throat; sore, excoriated mucous membranes of the mouth and throat.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Phosphorus is rich in symptoms of the rectum and stool; involuntary discharges from the bowels; copious emission of fluids; foetid, gushing stools; horribly offensive, yellow, watery stools. The patient lies as if dying, the stools passing involuntarily.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: It also cures inveterate constipation. The stool is hard, long, and slender, described in the books as like that of a dog. Alternating diarrhea and constipation in old people.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: After stool painful cramps in the rectum; burning in the anus; violent tenesmus; sinking feeling in the abdomen; obliged to lie down; exhaustion and fainting.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Burning in the rectum during stool. After stool painful cramps in the rectum; burning in the anus.
